ConfigObject.DESCR: Configured list of stored procedure which can be invoked from client
ConfigObject.NAME: stored_procedure

RESULTS.NAME: ARA_SUMMARY_PROC
RESULTS.DESCR: fetch the data for billable and A/R items by service type and item type

RESULTS.NAME: billing_updates
RESULTS.DESCR: To update item table with item number, AR_BILL_OBJ, due_t, effective_t, Opened_t, Closed_t, Status

RESULTS.NAME: BOC_ANALYTICS.get_accounts_by_status
RESULTS.DESCR: To get subscriber account metrics, Returns Total number of accounts in each status ACTIVE/INACTIVE/CLOSED

RESULTS.NAME: BOC_ANALYTICS.get_accounts_by_subscription
RESULTS.DESCR: Compute subscription metrics and returns details on number of subscription per product

RESULTS.NAME: BOC_ANALYTICS.get_accounts_receivable
RESULTS.DESCR: Computes accounts receivable Metric and returns details on amount to be collected for each month of last 1 year

RESULTS.NAME: BOC_ANALYTICS.get_billed_revenue
RESULTS.DESCR: Computes billing metrics and returns details on amount billed

RESULTS.NAME: BOC_ANALYTICS.get_payments_collected
RESULTS.DESCR: Computes payment metrics and returns details on payment billed

RESULTS.NAME: BOC_PROCESS_NAME_ACC_BY_STATUS
RESULTS.DESCR: To get subscriber account metrics, Returns Total number of accounts in each status ACTIVE/INACTIVE/CLOSED

RESULTS.NAME: BOC_PROCESS_NAME_ACC_BY_SUBS
RESULTS.DESCR: Compute subscription metrics and returns details on number of subscription per product

RESULTS.NAME: BOC_PROCESS_NAME_ACCS_RECEIVALBE
RESULTS.DESCR: Computes accounts receivable Metric and returns details on amount to be collected for each month of last 1 year

RESULTS.NAME: BOC_PROCESS_NAME_BILLED_REVENUE
RESULTS.DESCR: Computes billing metrics and returns details on amount billed

RESULTS.NAME: BOC_PROCESS_NAME_PYMT_COLLECTED
RESULTS.DESCR: Computes payment metrics and returns details on payment billed

RESULTS.NAME: BRMC_METRIC_SPROC_ACCOUNT
RESULTS.DESCR: To get subscriber account metrics

RESULTS.NAME: BRMC_METRIC_SPROC_BILLING
RESULTS.DESCR: To compute billing metrics

RESULTS.NAME: BRMC_METRIC_SPROC_GET_COUNT
RESULTS.DESCR: To get compute payment metrics

RESULTS.NAME: BRMC_METRIC_SPROC_PAYMENT
RESULTS.DESCR: To get the computed payment metrics

RESULTS.NAME: BRMC_METRIC_SPROC_SUBSCRIPTION
RESULTS.DESCR: To compute subscription metrics

RESULTS.NAME: CMT_DEPLOY_UPDATE
RESULTS.DESCR: Set the accounts active by replacing staging poid_db with target poid_db

RESULTS.NAME: create_incr_report
RESULTS.DESCR: Creates incremental report by comparing the previous and current report

RESULTS.NAME: create_journal
RESULTS.DESCR: It journals the events and creates journal entries for all events created at or before the input end time

RESULTS.NAME: dmttRepStateGet
RESULTS.DESCR: To return the current state by checking information from ttRepStateGet

RESULTS.NAME: failed_transactions_pkg.get_failed_trans_data
RESULTS.DESCR: Required by BOC to display history page

RESULTS.NAME: FM_PRICE_GET_MODELSEL_SPROC
RESULTS.DESCR: To retrieve model selectors, selector rules, selector details

RESULTS.NAME: FM_PRICE_GET_PIPELINE_DISC_DISCOUNTMODEL
RESULTS.DESCR: It is used by PCM_OP_PRICE_GET_DISCOUNT_INFO of Pricing Manager

RESULTS.NAME: FM_PRICE_GET_PRICEMDL_SPROC
RESULTS.DESCR: To get the price model details

RESULTS.NAME: FM_PRICE_GET_RATEPLAN_BY_RP_SPROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Used to retrieve one version that is passed for rate plan

RESULTS.NAME: FM_PRICE_GET_RATEPLAN_SPROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Retrieve the latest valid rate plam available for the provided date or system date

RESULTS.NAME: FM_PRICE_SET_MODELSEL_SPROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Used to create model selectors, selector rules, selector details, selector rule link and model selector rule set

RESULTS.NAME: FM_PRICE_SET_PRICEMDL_SPROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Used to update pipeline price model and price model steps

RESULTS.NAME: FM_PRICE_SET_RATEPLAN_SPROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Used to update rate plan, rate plan version and rate plan configuration data

RESULTS.NAME: get_fields_proc
RESULTS.DESCR: to get the encryptable fields info along with details of the first and second level array

RESULTS.NAME: GET_LATEST_DATA_FROM_ALL_NODES
RESULTS.DESCR: Fetch the count of latest poids and the mod_time

RESULTS.NAME: GET_LATEST_POIDS_FROM_TT
RESULTS.DESCR: Fetch the count of latest poids and the mod_time from all the TT nodes

RESULTS.NAME: GET_TABLE_NAME_FROM_CLASS
RESULTS.DESCR: It takes an input the class name and gets the corresponding table

RESULTS.NAME: get_tax_config_data
RESULTS.DESCR: Fetches the tax configuration data based on the input parameters

RESULTS.NAME: gl.create_aggregate_report_data
RESULTS.DESCR: To create aggregate report data based on the exported reports

RESULTS.NAME: gl.create_journal
RESULTS.DESCR: It journal the events and creates journal entries for all events created at or before the input end time

RESULTS.NAME: gl.get_gl_accts_data
RESULTS.DESCR: It return PIN_FLD_GL_ACCTS fields for the ledger_report

RESULTS.NAME: job_history_pkg.get_job_history_data
RESULTS.DESCR: It select list of jobs from the system based on filtering and soring criteria

RESULTS.NAME: OCSP_002_IN_OUT
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: OCSP_003
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: OCSP_004
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: OCSP_006
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: OCSP_007
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: OCSP_008
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: OCSP_009
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: OCSP_010
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: OCSP_011
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: PCM_RECID_ALL
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: perflib.get_rel_cumulative
RESULTS.DESCR: Get REL monitor cumulative results.

RESULTS.NAME: perflib.get_rel_summary
RESULTS.DESCR: Get REL summary results.

RESULTS.NAME: PERFLIB.GET_RT_SNAPSHOT
RESULTS.DESCR: To retrieve real-time snapshot data

RESULTS.NAME: PIN_RERATE_UPDATE_RERATE_JOB_SPROC_SQL
RESULTS.DESCR: Update the rerate job status to ACCOUNT_LOCKED or STATUS_RECYCLE based on string ACKPrepareToRerate

RESULTS.NAME: PIN_RERATE_UPDATE_RERATE_JOB_SPROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Update the rerate job status to ACCOUNT_LOCKED or STATUS_RECYCLE

RESULTS.NAME: pin_update_poid_to_null.update_poid_to_null
RESULTS.DESCR: Updates obj_id fields of a given class from zero to null

RESULTS.NAME: PRICING_DISCOUNTMODEL.SET_DISCOUNT_MODELS
RESULTS.DESCR: Used with PCM_OP_PRICE_COMMIT_DISCOUNT to commit discount model information

RESULTS.NAME: proc_cycle_deferred_tax
RESULTS.DESCR: summarizes the deferred taxable amounts from events, and insert them in the event_billing_taxes_t table

RESULTS.NAME: process_tmp_ar_items
RESULTS.DESCR: To prcess the account receivable items based on the actual sector boundaries of event storage

RESULTS.NAME: RA_SEARCH_PACK.RA_GET_REL_BID_PROC
RESULTS.DESCR: fFetches the audit data from the process_audit tables for all the /process_audit/batchstat/rel objects for search by batch Id

RESULTS.NAME: RA_SEARCH_PACK.RA_GET_REL_PROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Fetches the audit data from the process_audit tables for all the /process_audit/batchstat/rel objects for search by processing period

RESULTS.NAME: RA_SEARCH_PACK.RA_GET_REL_VBID_PROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Fetches the audit data from the process_audit tables for all the /process_audit/batchstat/rel objects for view by Batch Id and search by processing period

RESULTS.NAME: RA_SEARCH_PACK.RA_GET_RERATE_SUM_DETAIL_PROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Fetches the audit data for all the /process_audit/batchstat objects except /process_audit/batchstat/rel

RESULTS.NAME: RA_SEARCH_PACK.RA_GET_RRATE_SUM_DTL_BID_PROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Fetches the audit data for all the /process_audit/batchstat objects except /process_audit/batchstat/rel for search by Batch Id

RESULTS.NAME: RA_SEARCH_PACK.RA_GET_RRATE_SUM_DTL_VBID_PROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Fetches the audit data for all the /process_audit/batchstat objects except /process_audit/batchstat/rel for view by Batch Id and Search by processing period

RESULTS.NAME: RA_SEARCH_PACK.RA_GET_SUMM_DETAIL_VBID_PROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Fetches the audit data for all the /process_audit/batchstat objects except /process_audit/batchstat/rel for view by Batch Id and Search by processing period for Rating scope

RESULTS.NAME: RA_SEARCH_PACK.RA_GET_SUMMARY_DETAIL_BID_PROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Fetches the audit data for all the /process_audit/batchstat objects except /process_audit/batchstat/rel for search by Batch Id for Rating scope

RESULTS.NAME: RA_SEARCH_PACK.RA_GET_SUMMARY_DETAIL_PROC
RESULTS.DESCR: Fetches the audit data for all the /process_audit/batchstat objects except /process_audit/batchstat/rel for search by processing period/ServiceType/RevenueStream

RESULTS.NAME: RERATING.PURGE_RERATE_JOBS
RESULTS.DESCR: To purge the rerated jobs

RESULTS.NAME: rollup_subords_charges
RESULTS.DESCR: To Rollup subordinates charges into wholesale billing account

RESULTS.NAME: test_clob
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: test_clob1
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: TPrc4
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: unknown
RESULTS.DESCR: Used in unit testing of base opcode

RESULTS.NAME: update_credit_profile_ps7
RESULTS.DESCR: For the given input credit profile, it tries to match with the existing /config/credit_profile with PIN_FLD_DYNAMIC_CREDIT_FLOOR

RESULTS.NAME: validate_cycle_fee_processing
RESULTS.DESCR: This will check if the cycle charges are applied for all applicable products which are due in the system.

RESULTS.NAME: VERIFY_MULTI_NODE_DATA_IN_DB
RESULTS.DESCR: count of the poids and verifies whether they are present in db or not.

RESULTS.NAME: VERIFY_POIDS_IN_DB
RESULTS.DESCR: verifies whether input table name, mod_time and list poids are in db or not

RESULTS.NAME: wholesale_btd_merge_balances
RESULTS.DESCR: Stored procedure which is called to merge balances /balance_group and its sub tables

RESULTS.NAME: inv.get_invoice_chunk
RESULTS.DESCR: Stored procedure which returns the invoice details based on the input invoice type

RESULTS.NAME: update_data_sequence
RESULTS.DESCR: Stored procedure which returns the incremented sequence value.

RESULTS.NAME: job_history_pkg.get_workflow_sub_job_data
RESULTS.DESCR: It select the list of Sub jobs from the system for the required Workflow jobs
